---
title: "Interactive capacity map"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

Explore where Missoula's plan-enabled housing capacity clusters. **Hexes**
are shaded by Gi\* cluster confidence — **coral** marks statistically
significant concentrations of untapped capacity. Toggle on the
**opportunity parcels** layer to see the underlying vacant and underbuilt
lots; click any parcel for its current use, future land-use designation,
acreage, and plan-enabled units.

```{=html}
<iframe src="output/maps/hotspot_map.html"
        style="width:100%; height:78vh; border:1px solid #ddd; border-radius:6px;">
</iframe>
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
Sources: City of Missoula taxlot layer (2024). Capacity is plan-implied
(Growth Policy future land use), not a development forecast — see
[Methods & Sources](methods.qmd).
:::
